message.content: This section, titled "Core Combat and Gameplay Experience," functions as a structural heading indicating coverage of fundamental combat mechanics and player interaction design. It can answer high-level navigational or topical questions regarding the section's intended subject matter. However, the provided text contains no additional content, entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. Consequently, it cannot answer specific or detailed queries about gameplay features, combat systems, design rules, or performance data.
